title: CD Projekt Red acknowledges that its reputation has not yet recovered from the launch of Cyberpunk 2077
summary: Executives of the Polish developer admit to having lost the trust of a part of the players and that they are still working to restore it.

title: CD Projekt Red doubts that games created entirely with generative AI are the way forward
summary: The co-CEO of the company states that many AI-generated titles will arrive, but questions whether that is the right direction for the industry.

title: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane accident
summary: Claude Guillemot, one of the founders of the French video game company, died in a small plane accident.

title: Season 3 of 'House of the Dragon' sparks controversy among fans from its first episode
summary: The premiere of the new season has sparked debate over a line of dialogue and an Easter egg pointed out by viewers.

title: Allegedly leaked prices for GTA VI are likely false, according to reliable sources
summary: Several reports indicate that the high prices circulating on social media for Grand Theft Auto VI are not official and that pre-orders would begin in June.

title: Warframe developers lament the end of Destiny 2 and the weakening of the genre
summary: The creators of Warframe describe the conclusion of Destiny 2 as 'devastating' and consider that the loot-shooter genre becomes weaker without its competitor.

title: Ori creator calls Xbox Game Pass a 'mediocre crap factory' and compares it to communism
summary: The creator of Ori harshly criticizes Microsoft's subscription service, stating that it produces mediocre content and resembles communism.

title: Gears of War: E-Day brings back cooperative and multiplayer modes and is compared to 'Saving Private Ryan'
summary: The new title in the Gears of War saga will bring back the cooperative and multiplayer modes that the series had lost in the last decade.

title: Koei Tecmo opens pre-orders for Blue Reflection Quartet and releases a new trailer
summary: The Japanese company has released the second trailer and has begun pre-orders for its anticipated RPG Blue Reflection Quartet.

title: Aardman's stop-motion Pokémon series will be set in a very 'appropriate' region
summary: The studio behind Wallace and Gromit is developing a stop-motion animated Pokémon series that will arrive next year in an emblematic region.

title: Morrowind receives major improvements thanks to OpenMW and extended mod support
summary: The implementation of OpenMW and new scripting tools improve the stability and modding possibilities of the classic RPG.

title: Rose & Camellia Collection adds online battle mode in its latest update
summary: The classic fan-fighting game incorporates an online multiplayer mode starting June 22.

title: A fan mod revives The Last of Us multiplayer after official cancellation
summary: A group of fans is restoring the multiplayer mode of The Last of Us, which Sony canceled, and it will be available for PC but not for PS5.

title: An Xbox founder says her initial skepticism is coming true 25 years later
summary: Early warnings about Microsoft's strategy in the video game sector are proving prophetic in the current market crisis.

title: Bleach finally has a date for the final arc that fans have been waiting for for 22 years
summary: The Bleach anime has confirmed when the long-awaited final arc of the series will premiere.

title: EA lays off an undetermined number of employees ahead of its possible sale to Saudi Arabia for $55 billion
summary: Electronic Arts has conducted internal layoffs as it prepares for a multi-billion dollar acquisition by the Saudi fund PIF.

title: The Powerpuff Girls will return in a new movie
summary: The animated superhero trio will return to the big screen in a new feature film recently announced.

title: Naruto will have its first official trading card game in over a decade
summary: The launch of a new TCG based on the Naruto franchise is announced, the first in over ten years.

title: Obsidian Entertainment faces a class action lawsuit for wage law violations
summary: The RPG studio is accused of failing to comply with state wage and overtime laws in California.

title: Richard Garriott plans to reclaim the rights to Ultima from EA using a copyright clause
summary: The creator of the legendary RPG series believes he can recover the intellectual property through an old copyright law.
